_schema: Perk trees: one mini tree per background, ~8 perks each. LAW: perks unlock systems and dialogue options, never bare percentages. Sample 3 per tree; full trees authored in sprint 8.

perks.name: Read the Land II
perks.unlocks: soil moisture cues per field before ordering

perks.name: The Knee Knows
perks.unlocks: storm intuition arrives one day earlier

perks.name: Old Names
perks.unlocks: legacy dialogue options with Earl and Marge

perks.name: Price Alerts
perks.unlocks: notification when a commodity crosses a set threshold

perks.name: Coop Automation
perks.unlocks: chicken feeding no longer costs a time block

perks.name: Stethoscope Ear
perks.unlocks: see breakdown probability on any NPC's equipment in dialogue

perks.name: Flipper's Eye
perks.unlocks: restoration value estimate at the salvage yard

perks.name: Shop Rate
perks.unlocks: repair contract tier 2 dialogue with Marge
